lifecycle_current: {'lifecycle_current': 'legacy-supported', 'notes': 'DoD 5220.22-M data wiping standard is technically superseded by NIST SP 800-88 (current federal guidance since 2014/Rev2 Sept 2025), but the DoD 5220.22-M method remains widely referenced and used in industry compliance contexts for magnetic HDDs. notes: Cited as most stringent data cleansing standard available via Dell ARS special arrangement
